text:
ElevenLabs just lost its moat 

Someone just dropped Voicebox, and it clones any voice from just a 3-second audio clip, running 100% locally on your machine.

100% Open Source

You can now clone voices that sound actually real.
Non robotic, full human.

1.7B parameters of clean, natural speech.

its called voicebox, runs ENTIRELY on your laptop, costs $0 FOREVER, no cloud, no subscription, your voice data never leaves your machine

BREAKING: The "Ollama for voice cloning" just dropped.

It's called Voicebox and it clones any voice from just a few seconds of audio entirely on your machine.

No ElevenLabs subscription. No cloud uploads. No voice data leaving your device.

It's powered by Qwen3-TTS,

singers are in serious trouble

you can now generate real singing character with new Kling AI 2.6 on Higgsfield with any audio, uncensored, use any celebrity face..

no one can tell its AI..

Artists can now combine recordings with real instruments and AI tracks generated by Eleven Music into hybrid songs.

In this single-take demo, Mark from our Voices team shows how to blend live piano with AI violin and vocals using one-shot prompting.

You can now run ElevenLabs-level voice cloning completely offline 

LuxTTS is a local TTS model that clones voices from 3 seconds of audio at insane speeds. It runs at 150x real-time without you ever having to pay a subscription.

- Works perfectly on both CPU and GPU

Big moment for text-to-speech.

Qwen just open-sourced a text-to-speech model that lets you clone voices, design new ones, and control speech using natural language.

Let me explain what I mean:

You can literally tell it "speak in a cheerful tone with slight nervousness," and it

BREAKING: ElevenLabs releases AI music model.

You can now create studio-quality tracks with vocals using just a text prompt.

It also allows you to choose song duration and the style and genre.

Examples & link to try free below.

ElevenLabs finally has real competition

Voicebox is an open-source voice cloning studio that runs entirely on your machine

It clones a voice from just a few seconds of audio using Qwen3-TTS, then lets you generate speech, stories & full conversations in that same voice
